summary: Studio should not require NEXT_PUBLIC_RUNTIME_URL to be set in order to boot and serve embed/runtime paths
description: Studio currently treats NEXT_PUBLIC_RUNTIME_URL as required in places where it should fall back gracefully to the current deployment context. Remove the hard requirement, update the runtime/embed path handling accordingly, and keep the Studio test surface green.
notes: This is a broader fix with tests and config changes, useful as a medium-difficulty replay.
